query:
-- Check all prospects with Alastair as first name or similar email
SELECT id, firstName, lastName, email, pipelineStage, applicationData IS NOT NULL as hasApp, applicationSubmittedAt, createdAt
FROM recruitment_prospects
WHERE LOWER(firstName) LIKE '%alastair%' OR LOWER(email) LIKE '%naughton%' OR LOWER(email) LIKE '%mcnoughton%'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC;

-- Check if a confirmation email was ever sent to Alastair's email
SELECT res.*, rp.firstName, rp.lastName, rp.email 
FROM recruitment_emails_sent res
JOIN recruitment_prospects rp ON res.prospectId = rp.id
WHERE rp.id = 90018
ORDER BY res.sentAt DESC;
